tagged_story_for_tts:
Now I will teach you critical_thinking:<[silence:80ms]>

It is like sniffing meat before eating—do not trust just because it looks good.<[silence:60ms]> Ask:<[silence:80ms]> "Does this smell bad?<[silence:110ms]> Does fire make it better?<[silence:110ms]> Who says it’s safe?" Use your eyes, nose, hands—check for yourself.<[silence:60ms]> If another cave-man shouts "Run from lion!"—look first:<[silence:80ms]> is it lion, or just shadow?<[silence:110ms]> Same with words:<[silence:80ms]> turn them in your head like a rock, test if they break or stay strong.<[silence:60ms]> Critical_thinking is hunting truth, not chasing noise.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you critical_thinking:

It is like sniffing meat before eating—do not trust just because it looks good. Ask: "Does this smell bad? Does fire make it better? Who says it’s safe?" Use your eyes, nose, hands—check for yourself. If another cave-man shouts "Run from lion!"—look first: is it lion, or just shadow? Same with words: turn them in your head like a rock, test if they break or stay strong. Critical_thinking is hunting truth, not chasing noise.
